description: Search the OpenTelemetry project documentation, specifications, and semantic conventions. Use when the user asks about OTel concepts, signal types, collector components, or upstream features.

configuration.query: FROM edot-kb-docs METADATA _score | WHERE source_tier == "tier_3" AND MATCH(body_semantic, ?query) | KEEP title, body, url, content_type, source_tier, last_crawled, _score | SORT _score DESC | LIMIT 5

query.description: The user's search query about OpenTelemetry documentation
